cross_module_architecture.notes: Dependency directions are clean. Deduplicated dev mode logic between Convex and Next.js. Abuse guard logic moved to a cohesive subdirectory.

convention_outlier.notes: Standardized on named exports for all components. Merged testcaseArgs utilities. Filename consistency improved.

error_consistency.notes: Added robust error handling to all UI submission blocks. Centralized environment validation prevents cryptic runtime crashes. Swallowed errors in auth fixed.

abstraction_fitness.notes: Extracted shared route orchestration for API handlers. Decomposed page.tsx monolith into focused functional components (Landing, Level1, Results).

api_surface_coherence.notes: Deduplicated auth logic across session and leads routes. Centralized body parsing and validation logic in shared route helpers.

authorization_consistency.notes: Added GitHub authentication to all dev and auto-solve routes. Centralized environment variable validation.

ai_generated_debt.notes: Comments are high-value and focused on 'why'. Redundant JSDoc removed during refactoring.

incomplete_migration.notes: Testcase utility migration completed. Abuse-guard subdirectory migration completed.

package_organization.notes: src/lib/ organization improved by moving abuse-guard files to a dedicated subdirectory. Barrel exports used for clean imports.

high_level_elegance.notes: Domain decomposition is excellent. page.tsx is now a lean coordinator for focused sub-components. Multi-level game logic is well-factored.

mid_level_elegance.notes: Shared orchestration extracted for finish routes. Duplicated QuickJS constants centralized.

low_level_elegance.notes: Eliminated cookie-setting duplication in middleware. Functions are direct and well-scoped.

design_coherence.notes: Eliminated boolean state explosion in page.tsx by decomposing UI screens. Shared patterns extracted into reusable components. Theme colors centralized.
